title: Toasted Jamaican Jam Bread
description: A sweet breakfast item featuring toasted bread, charred fruits, and Jamaican spices.
instructions: Cut the bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Brush the slices with the Jamaican spice mix.
Arrange the slices on a baking sheet.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly toasted.
While the bread is baking, toast the coconut flakes in a pan over medium heat for 2-3 minutes.
Cut the charred pineapple into small pieces.
Assemble the toasted bread by spreading a layer of maple syrup, followed by a layer of toasted coconut flakes, and topped with charred pineapple pieces.
